targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  source AS metric,
  count() AS events
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(event_time) AS time,
    toString(src_ip) AS src_ip,
    toString(sig_id) AS event_key,
    'suricata_alerts' AS source
  FROM ngn_sip.suricata_alerts
  WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(label_time) AS time,
    toString(src_ip) AS src_ip,
    attack_id AS event_key,
    'attack_labels' AS source
  FROM ngn_sip.attack_labels
  WHERE $__timeFilter(label_time)
)
WHERE ('${src_ip}' = 'All' OR src_ip = '${src_ip}')
  AND ('${event_key}' = 'All' OR event_key = '${event_key}')
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time, metric

panels.title: Suricata alerts + attack labels by minute

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  source,
  src_ip,
  event_key,
  summary
FROM (
  SELECT
    event_time,
    'suricata_alerts' AS source,
    toString(src_ip) AS src_ip,
    toString(sig_id) AS event_key,
    signature AS summary
  FROM ngn_sip.suricata_alerts
  WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    label_time AS event_time,
    'attack_labels' AS source,
    toString(src_ip) AS src_ip,
    attack_id AS event_key,
    concat(mitre_technique, ' / ', phase, ' / ', notes) AS summary
  FROM ngn_sip.attack_labels
  WHERE $__timeFilter(label_time)
)
WHERE ('${src_ip}' = 'All' OR src_ip = '${src_ip}')
  AND ('${event_key}' = 'All' OR event_key = '${event_key}')
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT src_ip FROM (SELECT toString(src_ip) AS src_ip FROM ngn_sip.suricata_alerts WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) UNION ALL SELECT toString(src_ip) AS src_ip FROM ngn_sip.attack_labels WHERE $__timeFilter(label_time)) GROUP BY src_ip ORDER BY src_ip
list.label: src_ip
list.name: src_ip
list.query: SELECT src_ip FROM (SELECT toString(src_ip) AS src_ip FROM ngn_sip.suricata_alerts WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) UNION ALL SELECT toString(src_ip) AS src_ip FROM ngn_sip.attack_labels WHERE $__timeFilter(label_time)) GROUP BY src_ip ORDER BY src_ip

list.definition: SELECT event_key FROM (SELECT toString(sig_id) AS event_key FROM ngn_sip.suricata_alerts WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) UNION ALL SELECT attack_id AS event_key FROM ngn_sip.attack_labels WHERE $__timeFilter(label_time)) WHERE event_key != '' GROUP BY event_key ORDER BY event_key
list.label: sig_id / attack_id
list.name: event_key
